# Salesforce Weekly Change Report — Template

Use this exact structure when generating the `.docx` report. Each section should always be present, even if it contains "No changes this week."

---

## Document Header

**Title**: Salesforce Weekly Change Report
**Week**: Sunday [Date] – Saturday [Date]
**Generated**: [Today's date and time]
**Generated By**: Claude (Cowork)
**Purpose**: To identify changes in the Salesforce org that may be related to issues reported by the business.

---

## Executive Summary

2–4 sentences summarizing:
- Total number of changes recorded this week
- Any high-risk or high-impact changes worth flagging immediately
- Whether any changes are likely correlated with known business issues

---

## Section 1: High-Volume Data Changes

*Accounts or Opportunities where a single user updated more than 200 records this week.*

| Object | User | Records Updated | Potential Impact |
|--------|------|----------------|-----------------|
| Account | [Name] ([Username]) | [Count] | [Low/Medium/High] |
| Opportunity | [Name] ([Username]) | [Count] | [Low/Medium/High] |

**Notes**: [Any observations about why this might have occurred — bulk data load, integration, etc.]

If no users exceeded 200 records: "No high-volume data changes detected this week."

---

## Section 2: Security & Access Changes

*Profile modifications, Permission Set grants/revocations, Role changes.*

### Profiles Changed

| Changed By | Date | What Changed |
|------------|------|--------------|
| [User] | [Date/Time] | [Display text from SetupAuditTrail] |

### Permission Sets Changed

| Changed By | Date | What Changed |
|------------|------|--------------|
| [User] | [Date/Time] | [Display text from SetupAuditTrail] |

⚠️ **Flag any**: Permission removals, new admin-level permissions granted, or changes to profiles used by integrations or service accounts.

---

## Section 3: Code Changes (Apex)

*Apex classes and triggers created, modified, or deleted.*

### Apex Classes

| Class Name | Changed By | Date | API Version |
|------------|------------|------|-------------|
| [Name] | [User] | [Date] | [Version] |

### Apex Triggers

| Trigger Name | Object | Changed By | Date |
|--------------|--------|------------|------|
| [Name] | [Object] | [User] | [Date] |

⚠️ **Flag any**: Triggers on high-traffic objects (Account, Opportunity, Contact, Order), or classes named after known business processes.

---

## Section 4: Metadata Changes

*Custom fields, validation rules, approval processes, flows, process builder, and Lightning components.*

### Custom Fields

| Field | Changed By | Date | Action |
|-------|------------|------|--------|
| [Object.FieldName] | [User] | [Date] | Created / Modified / Deleted |

### Validation Rules

| Rule | Object | Changed By | Date | Action |
|------|--------|------------|------|--------|
| [Rule Name] | [Object] | [User] | [Date] | Activated / Deactivated / Modified |

### Approval Processes

| Process | Changed By | Date | Action |
|---------|------------|------|--------|
| [Name] | [User] | [Date] | [What changed] |

### Flows & Process Builder

| Flow/Process Name | Changed By | Date | Status Change |
|-------------------|------------|------|---------------|
| [Name] | [User] | [Date] | Activated / Deactivated / Modified |

⚠️ **Flag any**: Flows that were activated/deactivated (especially if recently activated before issues were reported), validation rules newly activated, field deletions.

### Lightning Components (LWC / Aura)

| Component | Changed By | Date | Action |
|-----------|------------|------|--------|
| [Name] | [User] | [Date] | Created / Modified |

---

## Section 5: Page Layout Changes

*Changes to record page layouts.*

| Layout Name | Object | Changed By | Date | Action |
|-------------|--------|------------|------|--------|
| [Name] | [Object] | [User] | [Date] | Modified / Created |

---

## Section 6: Lightning Record Page Updates

*Changes to Lightning App Builder pages (FlexiPages).*

| Page Name | Changed By | Date | Action |
|-----------|------------|------|--------|
| [Name] | [User] | [Date] | Modified / Activated / Deactivated |

---

## Section 7: Other Notable Changes

*Any significant changes from SetupAuditTrail not covered in the sections above.*

List here anything from the broad catch-all query (Query 8) that seems significant and wasn't captured in Sections 2–6. Use the same table format: What Changed | Who | When.

---

## Potential Issue Correlations

Based on the changes above, these items are most likely to be related to issues reported by the business:

1. [Change] — [Why it could cause issues]
2. [Change] — [Why it could cause issues]

If no obvious correlations: "No changes this week appear likely to cause the reported issues. Recommend investigating integration logs or data quality."

---

## Appendix: Change Volume by Day

| Day | Total Changes |
|-----|--------------|
| Sunday | [N] |
| Monday | [N] |
| Tuesday | [N] |
| Wednesday | [N] |
| Thursday | [N] |
| Friday | [N] |
| Saturday | [N] |

(Compute this from the CreatedDate field across all SetupAuditTrail results.)
